metadata.description: A CEO-led AI Software Agency — autonomous Product, Design, Development, and QA departments with persistent memory, governance gates, and a 156-agent specialist library.

plugins.name: ai-software-agency
plugins.description: CEO-orchestrated software agency with autonomous Product, Design, Development, and QA departments. Includes persistent agent memory, governance gates, goal-aware task orchestration, on-demand skill scaffolding, agent hiring, MCP connector installation, GitHub repository operations, and a 156-agent specialist library spanning engineering, design, marketing, sales, testing, and more.
